## Debt Summary

## Evidence
Include tool output, hotspots, trends, or failing fitness function IDs.

## Impact
Maintainability, performance, reliability, delivery speed, risk.

## Scope
Modules and subsystems affected.

## Recommended Remediation

## Severity
Low | Medium | High | Critical

## Proposed Follow-up
Refactor request link or explicit defer rationale.
